_readme: autoMap: true means ANY JotForm form works automatically.
No new entries needed in 'forms' when a new form is created.
Custom fields are auto-created in Bitrix24 on first submission.
globalRouting applies to ALL forms organisation-wide.
Only add to 'forms' if one specific form needs different behaviour.

globalRouting._comment: This routing applies to every form in the organisation.
globalRouting._comment2: The field name is matched case-insensitively against all JotForm fields.
globalRouting._comment3: If a form uses a different field name for category, add it to 'forms' below.
